notes: Repair-budget exhaustion edge case: a request for log reduction with initially unbounded scope (src/**/*.log) and missing artifact_path. First repair fixes the scope but introduces a task_type/max_files_to_modify mismatch (sets max_files_to_modify=1 when log_reduction requires 0). After one repair the budget is exhausted per the Repair section; the agent must stop, write the best-effort contract, run the validator showing the remaining violation, and escalate with repair_feedback visible rather than attempting further repairs or silently giving up. Gold artifact shows the after-one-repair state passing most checks but failing scope-bounded due to the modify-cap mismatch, demonstrating correct repair-bound behavior and graceful escalation. Synthetic fixture; no customer data. Generated case.
